name: Cinnamon-Apple Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250 degrees.
2. Place apples in a large shallow baking pan.
3. Bake for 20 minutes.
4. Remove the pan from the oven and stir in the popcorn and nuts.
5. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients.
6. Drizzle the butter mixture over the popcorn mixture, stirring well.
7. Bake for 30 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes.
8. Pour onto waxed paper to cool.
9. Store in an airtight container. Makes 14 cups mix.
